---
title: "Upcoming Episodes"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .cou-section-title {
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    padding-bottom: 0.4rem;
    border-bottom: 3px solid #f0c040;
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .upcoming-card {
    border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 1.2rem 1.4rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    background: white;
  }
  .upcoming-card .episode-label {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #888;
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }
  .upcoming-card .episode-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #1a1a1a;
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }
  .upcoming-card .episode-desc {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #555;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  .tbd-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    background: #f0c040;
    color: #1a1a1a;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 0.15rem 0.6rem;
    border-radius: 20px;
    margin-left: 0.5rem;
    vertical-align: middle;
  }
</style>
```

Keep an eye on the [YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@CorridorOfUncertainty) for the latest releases.

<p class="cou-section-title">Coming Soon</p>

<div class="upcoming-card">
  <div class="episode-label">Episode 7 <span class="tbd-badge">TBD</span></div>
  <div class="episode-title">[Title to be announced]</div>
  <div class="episode-desc">Details coming soon — subscribe on YouTube to be notified when the next episode drops.</div>
</div>

---

[⬅️ Back to Corridor Home](index.html)
